backend/main.mo: Main actor module defining Case, Activity, Document, and UserProfile types with persistent state maps, authorization/storage mixins, and CRUD functions for cases, activities, documents, and user profiles with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldCase records (without primaryContact, secondaryContact, productType) to NewCase records by adding default values for the three new fields while preserving activities and documents.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: contact dropdown with primary/secondary phone numbers, click-to-populate mobile field, default primary contact, and Product Type field display in CaseDetail.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, authentication, case management UI, activity tracking, document handling, and phone mockup wrapper with details on contact selector and product type features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, 'Kollect Lite' title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication check, loading state, and conditional rendering of LoginPrompt or RouterProvider.
Activity form component with Action/Outcome dropdowns, comments textarea, Add Comment button that submits activities to backend via useAddActivity mutation, and toggleable ActivityTimeline history display.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Displays a scrollable timeline of case activities sorted by timestamp, showing action type, outcome, payment details, and comments with badges and formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a debt collection case showing debtor name, status, customer ID, phone number, DPD badge with color coding, and contract ID.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Displays a scrollable timeline of case comments with timestamps, colored backgrounds, and timeline dots connecting each comment entry.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a checkmark confirmation for 2 seconds after copying.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Shows a list of case documents with file type icons, upload dates, preview buttons, and action buttons for uploading and scanning new documents.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header displaying the Kollect Lite logo, title, and a logout button that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with header, outlet for nested routes, and footer containing copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Centered login screen with Kollect Lite branding and Internet Identity login button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI preview.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Displays a colored badge for case status (escalated, active, PTP) with appropriate styling for each status type.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines Comment interface and exports dummy comment data for multiple cases with timestamps, agent names, and comment text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence via AuthClient, and delegation validation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating case data (cases, activities, documents) from the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, defining color schemes for a Kollect Lite branded UI with teal accents and gray backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component displaying debtor information, status, financial details, and sections for activities and documents, using dummy data mapped by case ID.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page displaying a searchable, filterable list of collection cases with dummy data for 20 cases, showing case cards and a phone mockup interface.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities for sensitive parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations for accordions, and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a collections management application that documents existing features (contact selector with primary/secondary contacts, product type field) and pending feature requests including backend Case type updates to support primaryContact, secondaryContact, and productType fields.
